# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.8-slim

# Install Docker SDK for Python
RUN pip install docker-py

# Set up environment variables for Docker endpoint
ENV DOCKER_API_VERSION 1.40
ENV DOCKER_HOST localhost:2375

# Add Docker group to user
RUN groupadd -g 1000 docker
RUN usermod -aG docker user

# Start the container with elevated permissions
CMD ["docker", "run", "--privileged", "-d"]
